title: CXXRTL RFE: better debug messages for out-of-bound memory access

features.name: memory write with dynamic addressing that may exceed depth
features.description: Code should include a memory write operation where the address is a dynamic signal that could potentially exceed the memory depth, triggering an out-of-bounds assertion in CXXRTL
features.snippet:
mem my_mem [256];
always @(posedge clk) if (en) my_mem[addr] <= data;
